issue.title: Go-only sweep lane 1175: remove remaining Python assets batch 5/10

blocker.summary: The repo-wide physical Python count was already zero in this workspace before the lane changes, so the count could not be reduced further numerically.

notes: This lane records concrete replacement evidence for the retained root helper path instead of removing a new on-disk Python file.
The issue should be accompanied by a local issue completion comment and state transition after these artifacts are written.
